content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA consisting of NNN integers. Calculate the number of ways to divide this array into subsegments, such that the sequence formed by taking bitwise AND in each segment of the partition is a palindrome.

More formally, consider a partition of the array into segments [L1,R1][L_1, R_1][L1‚Äč,R1‚Äč], [L2,R2][L_2, R_2][L2‚Äč,R2‚Äč], [L3,R3][L_3, R_3][L3‚Äč,R3‚Äč], ‚Ä¶\ldots‚Ä¶, [Lk,Rk][L_k, R_k][Lk‚Äč,Rk‚Äč] such that L1=1,L2=R1+1,L3=R2+1,‚Ä¶,Lk=Rk‚ąí1+1,Rk=NL_1 = 1, L_2 = R_1 + 1, L_3 = R_2 + 1, \ldots, L_k = R_{k - 1} + 1, R_k = NL1‚Äč=1,L2‚Äč=R1‚Äč+1,L3‚Äč=R2‚Äč+1,‚Ä¶,Lk‚Äč=Rk‚ąí1‚Äč+1,Rk‚Äč=N. Let's define BiB_iBi‚Äč as AND on iii-th segment: Bi=ALi‚ąß‚Ä¶‚ąßARiB_i=A_{L_i}\land\ldots\land A_{R_i}Bi‚Äč=ALi‚Äč‚Äč‚ąß‚Ä¶‚ąßARi‚Äč‚Äč, where x1‚ąßx2‚ąß‚Ä¶‚ąßxtx_1\land x_2\land \ldots \land x_tx1‚Äč‚ąßx2‚Äč‚ąß‚Ä¶‚ąßxt‚Äč, denotes bitwise AND of numbers x1,‚Ä¶,xtx_1, \ldots, x_tx1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,xt‚Äč.

A partition is palindromic if Bi=Bk+1‚ąíiB_i=B_{k + 1 - i}Bi‚Äč=Bk+1‚ąíi‚Äč for every 1‚Č§i‚Č§k1 \le i \le k1‚Č§i‚Č§k. Your task is to calculate the number of palindromic partitions. Since this number can be large, calculate it modulo 998244353998244353998244353.


Input Format

The first line of input contains TTT ‚ÄĒ the number of test cases you need to solve.
The first line of each test case contains one integer NNN ‚ÄĒ the size of the array.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč ‚ÄĒ the elements of the array AAA.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the number of ways to partition AAA into subsegments, such that the bitwise AND of these segments form a palindrome.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases is at most 300030003000.
